text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the New Year's holiday, but instead of resting,
King Halo and I are training as usual.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hm? I wonder what that commotion is.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Step right up and try your luck with our New
Year's lottery! This year's grand-prize is a coupon
for a hot spring vacation for two!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
First-prize winners get a deluxe carrot hamburger
steak! Second-prize winners get a bushel of
carrots! And third-prize winners can take home a
single carrot!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text: You two over there! Care to try your luck?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ooh, those prizes don't sound half bad.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Especially the hot spring coupon. I bet it's for a
first-rate relaxation facility.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Did you forget who you're talking to? I'm a
first-rate Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
It's only natural I should know a thing or two
about it!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: So, then... Trainer...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'm giving you the right to win a special prize on
my behalf! And I expect you to put your heart in
it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I feel her gaze fixed expectantly on me as I make
a purchase to get a raffle ticket.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It might be on her behalf, but I'm still the one
who's paying.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You only get one chance, Trainer! Crank that
spinner with all your strength and win me the
special prize!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
King Halo's trademark laughter echoes behind me
as I turn the handle of the raffle spinner until a
ball drops out.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves a grand-prize
winner! Come and get the coupon for your hot
spring vacation! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
That's amazing! Even you can do a good job when
you put your mind to it!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Well then, I'll take that hot spring coupon, thank
you very much! ♪ Excellent work, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
King Halo snatches the hot spring coupon and
tucks it in her pocket.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Now I have one more thing to look forward to!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: You mean our hot spring coupon.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Right now, we're both far too busy.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Even if we go somewhere and relax our bodies
right now, our minds won't be fully at ease.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
That's why I'm going to invite you only after
everything is finished and settled.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I guess she is planning to invite me on the hot spring trip eventually.
choice_data_list: You should've told me earlier then.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Oh? Is there a problem?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'm the one holding the coupon, you know. You
might want to watch that attitude.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
For instance, the first words coming out of your
mouth ought to be "Thank you!" That's not
unreasonable, right? Ohohoho!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A feeling of dread begins to creep in. Perhaps I've
given her too much power.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Regardless, I'm looking forward to spending a full
day just unwinding and relaxing.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have another first-prize winner!
Congratulations! You get one deluxe carrot
hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hmm... Well, first place isn't bad either.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
That deluxe carrot hamburger steak was made by
the chef of a five-star hotel. The taste is also
first-rate.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure I've told you this before, but I'm a
first-rate Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
It's only natural I should know a thing or two
about it!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Yes. I had it served fresh at a their restaurant.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
It was scrumptious. The way the tomato sauce and
juices ooze out when you bite down, along with
that rich cheese...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Gulp.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, let's go back to the academy at once! I'm
giving you the right to prepare my dinner!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She looks ready to wolf down an entire
restaurant. We return to the academy and I
prepare the hamburger steak immediately.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
We got a second-prize winner! It's your lucky day!
You're going home with a bushel of carrots!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thump!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: What should I... even say?
choice_data_list: It's certainly a lot of carrots.
It's certainly a lot of carrots.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Y-yeah...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the clerk continues to pile carrot after carrot
on top of the already monstrous heap, King Halo
grows anxious.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
There's still more! I wasn't lying about the
mountain part!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Eep! You can't be serious!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thump!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: They keep adding more...
choice_data_list:
We'll have to make a few trips to bring them all
back.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Y-yeah... Let's do that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Several trips later, we finally manage to bring the bushel of carrots back to the academy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When we finally finish eating our giant supply, I
give King Halo a high five of relief.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Would you lookie here! You've won the
third-prize! Here's your carrot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
One carrot... One. Single. Carrot? Where's the
luxurious prize I asked you for?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: This is only good for a post-workout juice!
choice_data_list: (Well, at least she knows how to prepare it.)
(Well, at least she knows how to prepare it.)

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, make yourself useful and put this in the
blender for me.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Let's hurry back to the academy. I expect some good juice.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Upon our return, I blend up the carrot and serve
her some freshly made carrot juice.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, tough luck! Looks like you pulled a blank
one! Take this pack of tissues as a consolation
prize.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, don't worry. I'll simply pretend I didn't
see anything.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Now, let's try again. I'll keep my eyes closed. Off
you go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, we could only try once with our single
lottery ticket. I manage to pacify her on the way
back to the academy.
